Lesson10/pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Maven compiler release target to Java 21 to ensure the project compiles against the new JDK version.
Lesson10/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this property, the project would compile against the default JDK version (likely 11 or the host JDK), failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing compatibility issues if the host JDK is not 21.

Lesson10/pom.xml.general_idea: Exclude the legacy JUnit 4 dependency from the quickfixj-all transitive dependencies to avoid conflicts with modern testing frameworks.
